ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer record was last updated */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., individual, organization) */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points for rewards programs */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" TEXT /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cust_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Food, Emergency Kits) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product record was last updated */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product for shipping calculations */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product for shipping and storage */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the product based on customer reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Processing, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order record was last updated */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Pending, Failed) */,
  "discount_applied" TEXT /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping used for the order */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the order */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date for the order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who processed the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_cust_id FOREIGN KEY ("cust_id") REFERENCES customers ("cust_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in the item */,
  "units_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold of the product */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order item record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order item record was last updated */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the specific item */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the specific item */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, salesperson) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed and salted) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., Active, Inactive, Locked) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions or roles for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
